name: Onamba Co., Ltd.
summary: Onamba Co., Ltd. manufactures and distributes wires and components for household electronic appliances, business equipment, and industrial electronic appliances in Japan and internationally. The company offers renewable energy related products, including photovoltaic-interconnecting units (PVU), PVU-Finders, solar system cables, battery and sensor systems, IoT gateway solutions, remote monitoring systems, and automated misting systems. It also provides automotive wire harnesses for seatbelts and airbags, air conditioners, lighting, audio equipment, and starters for automobile engines; consumer harnesses; industrial harnesses; and cable processed products. In addition, the company offers harness processing machinery and parts, including automotive connectors, and equipment and machinery; various cables and wires, which include general purpose cables, computer cables, camera cables, production regulation cables, measurement cables, LAN cables, etc.; and coaxial cables for automotive camera modules. Onamba Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1941 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
